The '''''Huntbird''''' was an [[explorer-cruiser]] lent to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] on behalf of the [[New Jedi Order]] by [[Umwaw Moolis]] in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]. Skywalker flew the ship from [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]] to the [[Moonflower Nebula/Legends|Moonflower Nebula]] to search for the ''[[Eye of Palpatine]]''.

He was accompanied by two Jedi students, [[Cray Mingla]] and [[Nichos Marr/Legends|Nichos Marr]], as well as [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]. The vessel was attacked outside the [[Moonflower Nebula/Legends|Moonflower Nebula]] by the battlemoon and was damaged, forcing it to land on [[Pzob/Legends|Pzob]]. There, the ship was attacked by the native [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]].

The ship was abandoned on Pzob when the ''Eye of Palpatine'' captured Skywalker and his students.

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]
